name: compound-agent-system
description: Codex compatible workspace harness for activating the Compound Agent System: task ledger, DoD gates, handoff bridge, agent profiles, and portable verification assets.

interface.shortDescription: Activate task ledger, DoD gates, handoff bridge, and agent profiles.
interface.longDescription: A repo-portable workspace harness bundle. It installs the Compound Protocol files into a target repository, then guides agents through task activation, Definition of Done verification, token-budget handoff, and multi-agent profile usage.
defaultPrompt: Activate Compound Protocol in this repo.
Open a task with DoD gates and verify it.
Create a handoff checkpoint for another agent.
